subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was perused. Verily, his honor Mirza Muhammad-Baqir Khan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما ملاحظه گردید فی الحقیقه جناب آقا میرزا محمد باقر خان
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @interpretation of dreams and visions
